options.content:
**How to read this strip:** Health score combines scrape up, restarts, HTTP 5xx ratio, and JVM heap.
**GOOD ≥ 80** · **WATCH 50–79** · **ACT < 50**. Use Method + API path filters (top) to drill latency/errors; **All** = sum across APIs.

targets.expr:
clamp_min(
  clamp_max(
    100
    - 40 * (1 - clamp_max(
        max(up{job="kubernetes-pods",namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
          or max(up{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
          or vector(0),
        1))
    - 15 * clamp_max(
        ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 1),
        1)
    - 10 * clamp_max(
        ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 3),
        1)
    - 15 * clamp_max(
        (
          (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
          /
          clamp_min(
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
            1e-9
          )
          >= bool 0.01
        ),
        1)
    - 15 * clamp_max(
        (
          (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
          /
          clamp_min(
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
            1e-9
          )
          >= bool 0.05
        ),
        1)
    - 10 * clamp_max(
        (
          (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
          /
          clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
          >= bool 0.7
        ),
        1)
    - 10 * clamp_max(
        (
          (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
          /
          clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
          >= bool 0.9
        ),
        1),
    100),
  0)

(
  clamp_min(
    clamp_max(
      100
      - 40 * (1 - clamp_max(
          max(up{job="kubernetes-pods",namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
            or max(up{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
            or vector(0),
          1))
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 1),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 3),
          1)
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min(
              (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
              1e-9
            )
            >= bool 0.01
          ),
          1)
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min(
              (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
              1e-9
            )
            >= bool 0.05
          ),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
            >= bool 0.7
          ),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
            >= bool 0.9
          ),
          1),
      100),
    0)
  >= bool 80
) + (
  clamp_min(
    clamp_max(
      100
      - 40 * (1 - clamp_max(
          max(up{job="kubernetes-pods",namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
            or max(up{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"})
            or vector(0),
          1))
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 1),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          ((sum(kube_pod_container_status_restarts_total{namespace="$namespace",pod=~"$app.*"}) or vector(0)) >= bool 3),
          1)
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min(
              (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
              1e-9
            )
            >= bool 0.01
          ),
          1)
      - 15 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",status=~"5.."}[5m])) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min(
              (sum(rate(http_server_requests_seconds_count{application="$application",namespace="$namespace"}[5m])) or vector(0)),
              1e-9
            )
            >= bool 0.05
          ),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
            >= bool 0.7
          ),
          1)
      - 10 * clamp_max(
          (
            (sum(jvm_memory_used_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(0))
            /
            clamp_min((sum(jvm_memory_max_bytes{application="$application",area="heap"}) or vector(1)), 1)
            >= bool 0.9
          ),
          1),
      100),
    0)
  >= bool 50
)

options.content:
**If ACT / red scrape** → check pods, image, Helm version below, then rollout.
**If 5xx or latency bad** → set **Method** + **API path**, open Golden Signals + API SLO table.
**If heap / CPU red** → open JVM and Kubernetes sections.
**Still unclear** → Error logs, then Tempo traces.

**Service health** — First stop in an incident: are pods up and scraping, restarting, and what **image / Helm chart / app version** is live?
Green KPIs → continue to Golden Signals. Red scrape/restarts → fix deploy before reading latency charts.

panels.title: 2 · Golden Signals (filter by Method + API path · All = sum)

options.content:
**Golden Signals** — Y-axis on rate charts is **requests per second** (e.g. **0.03 ≈ 0.03 req/s**, about 1.8 requests/minute — light traffic, not 3%).
**All** on Method/API path = include every endpoint (filter `.*`). **total (sum)** panels add them into one line; **by API** panels draw **one colored line per method+uri**.

panels.title: Traffic — TOTAL rate (sum of matching APIs) · req/s
Traffic — per API (one line each) · req/s

targets.expr: topk(12, histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (method, uri, le) (rate(http_server_requests_seconds_bucket{application="$application",namespace="$namespace",method=~"$method",uri=~"$uri",uri!~".*actuator.*"}[5m]))))

panels.title: Latency — p95 per API (one line each) · seconds
Errors — 5xx per API (one line each) · req/s
3 · API SLO table (also respects Method + API path filter)

options.content:
**API SLO table** — Per-endpoint status counts and latency percentiles for the time range.
Use this to find which URI is failing or slow; cell colors highlight 4xx/5xx and high latency.

panels.title: API metrics — status · fail · avg/p50/p75/p90/p95 (filter or All)
4 · HTTP trends (same Method + API path filter)

options.content:
**HTTP trends** — Same filters. Charts marked **per API** use different colors per `METHOD /path`.
**0.03 on the axis = 0.03 requests/second** (Prometheus `rate()`), not 3% and not raw request count.

panels.title: Requests by status code (one line per status) · req/s
Requests by outcome (one line each) · req/s

options.content: **MongoDB** — Command rate, p95 latency, and pool usage. Rising checked-out / pool size with latency spikes often means connection pressure or slow queries.
**Redis** — Command rate and p95. Empty panels mean the app is not emitting Lettuce metrics yet (or Redis is unused).
**Kafka** — Listener rate, failures, p95 duration, and consumer lag. Growing lag + listener errors → consumer stuck or poison messages.
**JVM / process** — Heap, GC, threads, Tomcat busy threads. Heap near max + GC spikes → risk of OOM or long pauses; check before scaling blindly.
**Kubernetes pressure** — Container CPU and memory over time (detail after the KPI strip). Sustained high CPU with latency rise → scale or optimize hot APIs.

**Evidence** — Proof layer after metrics. Open Tempo for the service, then **Error logs** first, then full Logs.
Correlate a bad URI from the API table with error lines and a slow trace.
